name: Azura's Star
trappable_souls: Can hold any soul, excluding those of humanoids.

name: The Black Star
trappable_souls: Is said to only hold souls of humanoids, but in fact can hold any soul.

name: Petty Soul Gem
trappable_souls: Can hold creature souls below level 4.

name: Lesser Soul Gem
trappable_souls: Can hold creature souls below level 16.

name: Common Soul Gem
trappable_souls: Can hold creature souls below level 28.

name: Greater Soul Gem
trappable_souls: Can hold creature souls below level 38.

name: Grand Soul Gem
trappable_souls: Can hold any soul, excluding those of humanoids.

name: Black Soul Gem
trappable_souls: Can hold any soul, including those of humanoids.

name: Warped Soul Gem
trappable_souls: For the questArniel's Convection. Cannot hold souls.

name: Wylandriah's Soul Gem
trappable_souls: For the questHunt and Gather. Can only be used for recharging.
